summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 open PRs. No shared canonical was selected. Security-sensitive hydrated refs are routed to central security handling; unrelated non-security PRs are kept as independent or related review items with no GitHub mutations planned.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive PRs are out of scope for Clownfish backlog cleanup and must be routed without close, merge, or fix actions.
Keep as an independent maintainer-owned review item; no closure or merge action is supported by this shard.
Keep as an independent viable review item tied to its linked issue; no close or merge action is allowed here.
Keep as an independent active review item; no duplicate, superseded, close, or merge decision is established by the hydrated evidence.
Keep as an independent maintainer-review item; failing proof blocks merge/fixed-by actions but does not justify closure.
Keep as an independent hosted-provider test coverage PR, not superseded by the closed Ollama matrix PR.
Secrets and apiKey audit behavior is security-sensitive and must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling without mutation.
Broad memory review-queue work with security-boundary labeling is out of scope for Clownfish cleanup and should route centrally.
Keep as an independent non-security hardening review item under the hydrated OpenClaw security posture.
Keep related to the thinkingLevel family, but do not close or supersede because the apparent replacement PR is unhydrated and the current PR still has failing proof.
